old_column.content: The `PinInput` component is similar to the [Input](/docs/form/input) component,

new_column.content: The `PinInput` component is similar to the [Input](/docs/form/input) component,

old_column.content: but it is optimized for entering sequences of digits.

new_column.content: but it is optimized for entering sequences of digits.

old_column.content: The most common application is for entering OTP or security codes.

new_column.content: The most common application is for entering OTP or security codes.

old_column.content: - **PinInput:** The component that provides context to all the pin-input fields.

new_column.content: - **PinInput:** The component that provides context to all the pin-input fields.

old_column.content: - **PinInputField:** The text field that user types in - must be a direct child

new_column.content: - **PinInputField:** The text field that user types in - must be a direct child

old_column.content: Each input collects one number at a time. When a number is entered, focus is

new_column.content: Each input collects one number at a time. When a number is entered, focus is

old_column.content: moved automatically to the next input, until all fields are filled.

new_column.content: moved automatically to the next input, until all fields are filled.
